column1: Deposit required: 40% upon acceptance of estimate
Progress payment #1: 30% upon completion of footings pour
Progress payment #2: 20% upon completion of foundation walls
Final payment: 10% upon inspection approval and backfill completion
1. This estimate is valid for 30 days from the date above.
2. Pricing is based on current material costs and may adjust if costs change significantly.
3. Any changes to the scope of work or engineering plans may result in additional charges.
4. Client is responsible for providing approved engineering plans and permits.
5. All underground utilities must be located and marked prior to excavation.
6. Soil conditions assumed stable; rock removal or dewatering is additional cost.
7. Footing and foundation inspections must pass before proceeding to next phase.
8. Work complies with local building codes and approved engineering specifications.
9. Warranty: 1 year on workmanship; structural per engineering specifications.
10. Unforeseen conditions (high water table, contaminated soil, etc.) may require change orders.
11. Backfill will not occur until foundation walls have cured minimum 7 days.
12. Client responsible for final grading and landscaping unless included in scope.
